about.title: I deliver critical software — and I build my own.
body: I'm Marcos Estévez Navarro, a Delivery & Project Manager based in Vigo (Pontevedra, Spain). 6+ years in software, 4 of them managing delivery.

For 3 years I led the delivery of a critical software product for BMW Group, within a 100-150 engineer program with 3 suppliers: the main client contact, owning scope, timeline, quality and budget, with daily integration and a release at every milestone.
And I build my own products end to end: I design them, develop them and ship them to production. Running complex delivery and building real software is what I bring to every project.
about.forClientsText: The rigor of a system that can't fail, applied to your product.
about.forRecruitersText: Critical software delivery, client & supplier management, Agile/Scrum, delivery metrics and budget.

skills.title: What's in the toolbox.
